data.state: Enter your state (2-letter code, e.g., TX, CA).
data.zone: Enter your weather zone (1-3 digits, e.g., 19).
data.media_players: Select media players for EAS announcements.
data.include_description: Include alert description details in TTS.
data.tts_warnings: Enable TTS for Warnings (e.g., Tornado Warning, Flood Warning).
data.tts_watches: Enable TTS for Watches (e.g., Tornado Watch, Flood Watch).
data.tts_statements: Enable TTS for Statements/Advisories (e.g., Dense Fog Advisory, Child Abduction Emergency).
data.call_sign: Set the call sign for the EAS Header Protocol.

user.description: Configure WeatherStar 4k+ with your location and TTS settings. Zone and county codes can be found at weather.gov.
user.title: Configure WeatherStar 4k+

reconfigure.title: Re-configure WeatherStar 4k+
